scripts.lint: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),{execSync}=require('child_process');function scan(d){fs.readdirSync(d).forEach(f=>{const p=path.join(d,f);if(fs.statSync(p).isDirectory())scan(p);else if(p.endsWith('.js')){execSync('node -c \"'+p+'\"');}});};scan('./src');console.log('✅ All JS files passed syntax check.');"
